---
title: "Unit 3: Mensuration"
number-sections: true
number-depth: 2
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{python}
#| output: false
import sys
sys.path.insert(0, '../unit3-Mensuration')
from Mensuration import generate
from collections import defaultdict

sec_conversions = generate(
    types=["convert_length","convert_area","convert_volume","convert_mixed"],
    seed=10, count=6,
)

sec_volume = generate(
    types=[
        "prism_rectangle","prism_given_area","prism_triangle",
        "prism_trapezoid","prism_parallelogram",
        "cylinder_radius","cylinder_diameter",
        "half_cylinder","quarter_cylinder","sector_cylinder",
    ],
    seed=20, count=6,
)

sec_composite_vol = generate(
    types=[
        "composite_prism_cylinder","composite_two_prisms",
        "composite_l_prism","composite_cylinder_subtract","composite_tunnel",
        "composite_t_cuboids",
        "find_missing_prism","find_missing_cylinder","find_missing_tri_prism",
        "context_tank","context_shed",
        "similar_cylinders",
    ],
    seed=30, count=6,
)

sec_sa = generate(
    types=[
        "sa_cuboid","sa_open_box","sa_triangular_prism","sa_trapezoidal_prism",
        "sa_l_prism",
        "sa_cylinder_closed","sa_cylinder_open","sa_cylinder_tube","sa_half_cylinder",
        "sa_composite_prism_halfcyl","sa_composite_subtract","sa_cylinder_cone",
    ],
    seed=40, count=6,
)

sec_curved = generate(
    types=[
        "pyramid_rect","pyramid_square","pyramid_given_area","pyramid_missing",
        "cone_radius","cone_pythagoras",
        "sphere_radius","sphere_diameter","hemisphere",
        "composite_cone_hemisphere",
        "sa_sphere","sa_sphere_diameter","sa_hemisphere",
        "sa_cone","sa_cone_slant",
    ],
    seed=50, count=6,
)

sec_algebra = generate(
    types=[
        "algebraic_prism_rectangle","algebraic_prism_triangle",
        "algebraic_cylinder","algebraic_find_x",
    ],
    seed=60, count=6,
)

def by_diff(exercises):
    g = defaultdict(list)
    for ex in exercises:
        g[ex["meta"]["difficulty"]].append(ex)
    return g

gconv   = by_diff(sec_conversions["exercises"])
gvol    = by_diff(sec_volume["exercises"])
gcvol   = by_diff(sec_composite_vol["exercises"])
gsa     = by_diff(sec_sa["exercises"])
gcurved = by_diff(sec_curved["exercises"])
galg    = by_diff(sec_algebra["exercises"])

# вФАвФА Shared render helpers вФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФАвФА
def render_part_q(p):
    if p.get("is_wide") or p.get("is_word"):
        return f"{p['label']})  $${p['question_latex']}$$\n"
    return f"{p['label']})  ${p['question_latex']}$  \n"

def render_part_a(p):
    if p.get("is_wide") or p.get("is_word"):
        return f"{p['label']})  $${p['answer_latex']}$$\n"
    return f"{p['label']})  ${p['answer_latex']}$  \n"

def render_exercises(exercises, prefix):
    for ex in exercises:
        print(f"::::: {{#exr-{prefix}-{ex['number']}}}\n")
        print(f"### {ex['title']}\n")
        print(f"{ex['instruction']}\n")

        # SA exercises: one diagram with letter labels for the whole exercise
        if ex.get("ex_svg"):
            print("```{=html}")
            print('<div style="display:flex;justify-content:center;margin:8px 0;">')
            print(ex["ex_svg"])
            print('</div>')
            print("```\n")

        # Volume exercises: one diagram per part with actual numbers
        elif any(p.get("svg") for p in ex["parts"]):
            print("```{=html}")
            print('<div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;'
                  'justify-content:center;margin:8px 0;">')
            for p in ex["parts"]:
                if p.get("svg"):
                    print('<div style="text-align:center;">')
                    print(f'<div style="font-size:11px;color:#555;'
                          f'margin-bottom:2px;font-style:italic;">({p["label"]})</div>')
                    print(p["svg"])
                    print('</div>')
            print('</div>')
            print("```\n")

        for p in ex["parts"]:
            print(render_part_q(p))
        print('\n::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}')
        print("## рЯФН View Solution\n")
        for p in ex["parts"]:
            print(render_part_a(p))
        print(":::")
        print("::: exercise-meta")
        print('<div class="skill-container">')
        for skill in ex["meta"]["skills"]:
            print(f'  <span class="skill-badge">{skill}</span>')
        print('</div>')
        print(":::")
        print(":::::\n")
```

## рЯОѓ Learning Targets

{{< include Mensuration-Learning-Targets.qmd >}}

---

## рЯЧВпЄП Formula Cards

{{< include Mensuration-Formulas.qmd >}}

---

## рЯУП Part A вАФ Unit Conversions {#sec-conversions}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## рЯФС Key Conversion Facts

| Dimension | Conversion |
|-----------|-----------|
| **Length** | $\times10$: cmвЖТmm ¬Ј $\times100$: mвЖТcm ¬Ј $\times1000$: kmвЖТm |
| **Area** | $\times100$: cm¬≤вЖТmm¬≤ ¬Ј $\times10{,}000$: m¬≤вЖТcm¬≤ ¬Ј $\times10^6$: km¬≤вЖТm¬≤ |
| **Volume** | $\times1000$: cm¬≥вЖТmm¬≥ ¬Ј $\times10^6$: m¬≥вЖТcm¬≥ ¬Ј $1\text{ m}^3=1000\text{ L}$ |

*To go the other way: divide by the same factor.*
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯЯҐ Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gconv.get("easy", []), "conv")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯЯ° Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gconv.get("medium", []), "conv")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## рЯУ¶ Part B вАФ Volume of Prisms and Cylinders {#sec-volume}

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯЯҐ Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gvol.get("easy", []), "vol")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯЯ° Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gvol.get("medium", []), "vol")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯФі Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gvol.get("hard", []), "vol")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## рЯІ© Part C вАФ Composite Solids & Missing Dimensions {#sec-composite}

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯЯ° Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcvol.get("medium", []), "comp")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯФі Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcvol.get("hard", []), "comp")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## рЯО® Part D вАФ Surface Area {#sec-sa}

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯЯҐ Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gsa.get("easy", []), "sa")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯЯ° Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gsa.get("medium", []), "sa")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯФі Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gsa.get("hard", []), "sa")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## рЯФЇ Part E вАФ Pyramids, Cones and Spheres {#sec-curved}

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯЯҐ Easy

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcurved.get("easy", []), "cur")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯЯ° Medium

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcurved.get("medium", []), "cur")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

### рЯФі Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(gcurved.get("hard", []), "cur")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## рЯФ£ Part F вАФ Algebraic Volume {#sec-algebra}

::: {.callout-note icon=false}
## рЯУМ What to expect
These questions give dimensions as algebraic expressions (e.g. $2x$, $x+3$). Apply the volume formula, expand brackets, and simplify using index laws.
:::

:::::::::: panel-tabset

### рЯФі Challenging

```{python}
#| output: asis
render_exercises(galg.get("hard", []), "alg")
```

::: math-sep
вИС √Ч ѕА √Ј вИЪ вЧЖ вИЮ ¬± вИЂ вЙ† ќФ
:::

::::::::::

---

## вЪ° Test Your Knowledge {#sec-mensuration-worksheet}

```{=html}
<link rel="stylesheet" href="../../assets/worksheet.css">
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/pyodide/v0.25.0/full/pyodide.js"></script>
<script src="../../assets/worksheet.js"></script>

<div class="ws-toolbar no-print">
  <div class="ws-controls">
    <button class="ws-btn primary" id="btn-ws-new" onclick="wsGenerate()" disabled>рЯФД New Session</button>
    <button class="ws-btn outline" onclick="wsOpenPreview()">рЯСБпЄП Preview & Print</button>
    <a href="https://app.flintk12.com/activities/volume-and-surf-19b9e1/sessions/new" target="_blank" class="ws-btn flint">рЯ§Ц Get Help</a>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-loading" class="ws-status">вП≥ Loading Python...</div>
</div>

<div id="ws-container"></div>

<div id="ws-preview-overlay" class="ws-modal no-print">
  <div class="ws-modal-header">
    <span id="ws-preview-title-text">Worksheet Preview</span>
    <div class="ws-modal-btns">
      <button class="ws-btn-small print" onclick="wsPrint()">рЯЦ®пЄП Print PDF</button>
      <button class="ws-btn-small close" onclick="wsClosePreview()">вЬХ Close</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div id="ws-preview-scroll" class="ws-modal-body"></div>
</div>


<script>
window.WS_CONFIG = {
  title:    "Unit 3: Mensuration",
  unit:     "Unit 3 ¬Ј Mensuration",
  pyPath:   "Mensuration.py",
  template: "word",
  count:    5,
  types: [
    "convert_length",
    "convert_area",
    "convert_volume",
    "prism_rectangle",
    "prism_triangle",
    "cylinder_radius",
    "sa_cuboid",
    "sa_cylinder_closed",
    "composite_l_prism",
    "pyramid_rect",
    "cone_radius",
    "sphere_radius",
    "find_missing_prism",
    "algebraic_prism_rectangle"
  ]
};
</script>
```
